# SharpPages

> SharpPages is a performance web studio that builds fast static sites, runs programmatic SEO at scale, and manages paid social campaigns. Sites load in under a second, score 90+ on PageSpeed, and ship with full schema markup, OG tags, and sitemaps. No WordPress, no Webflow, no hourly billing. Flat fees, you own all files, no platform lock-in. Built 700+ pages with an average PageSpeed score of 98.

SharpPages serves B2B SaaS companies, medical device companies, pharma field marketing teams, conference organizers, med spas, healthcare practices, real estate firms, law firms, home services, professional services, startups, and franchise/multi-location businesses. The studio handles everything from website design and migration to SEO strategy and Facebook/Instagram ad management.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://sharppages.com/): Fast sites, real SEO results, no hourly billing
- [Services](https://sharppages.com/services/): Full catalog of web development, SEO, and ad management services
- [Pricing](https://sharppages.com/pricing/): Flat-fee pricing for all service tiers
- [Work](https://sharppages.com/work/): Portfolio and case studies
- [Free Site Audit](https://sharppages.com/audit/): Instant PageSpeed and SEO audit tool
- [Blog](https://sharppages.com/blog/): Web performance, SEO, and digital marketing articles
- [About](https://sharppages.com/about/): Company background and founder
- [Contact](https://sharppages.com/contact/): Project inquiry form
- [Locations](https://sharppages.com/locations/): Service areas

## Services

- [Website Design & Build](https://sharppages.com/services/web-design/): Static HTML/CSS sites with sub-1-second load times and 90+ PageSpeed scores
- [Website Redesign & Migration](https://sharppages.com/services/redesign/): WordPress, Webflow, and Squarespace to static migration
- [SEO & Content Strategy](https://sharppages.com/services/seo/): Programmatic SEO at scale with hub-and-spoke architecture
- [Event Registration Sites](https://sharppages.com/services/events/): Custom registration pages with GA4 and Meta Pixel, 48hr turnaround
- [Paid Social Advertising](https://sharppages.com/services/ads/): Facebook/Instagram campaign management with 2x industry-average CTR
- [PageSpeed Audit & Fix](https://sharppages.com/services/audit/): Performance bottleneck identification and resolution

## Industries

- [Medical Device Companies](https://sharppages.com/for/medical-device-companies/): Web and marketing for medical device sales teams
- [Pharma Field Marketing](https://sharppages.com/for/pharma-field-marketing/): Event sites and digital campaigns for pharma
- [B2B SaaS](https://sharppages.com/for/b2b-saas/): High-performance sites for SaaS companies
- [Conference Organizers](https://sharppages.com/for/conference-organizers/): Registration sites and event marketing
- [Med Spas](https://sharppages.com/for/med-spas/): Fast sites and local SEO for medical spas
- [Healthcare Practices](https://sharppages.com/for/healthcare-practices/): Web presence for healthcare providers
- [Real Estate](https://sharppages.com/for/real-estate/): Property and brokerage sites
- [Law Firms](https://sharppages.com/for/law-firms/): Legal practice websites
- [Home Services](https://sharppages.com/for/home-services/): Contractor and home services sites
- [Startups](https://sharppages.com/for/startups/): Early-stage SaaS and startup sites
- [Franchise & Multi-Location](https://sharppages.com/for/franchise-multi-location/): Multi-location business sites
